hero.badge: Available on App Store and Google Play
hero.headline2: for Every Child with Special Needs
hero.subtitle: Exercises and progress at home. One platform for organizations and specialists.
hero.statMain: 1,500+ families already use Nuroo in 30 countries

problem.title: Special Needs Support is
problem.intro: 240M+ children need support. Most families face limited access, high costs, and long waits.
problem.limitedAccessDesc: Only 1 in 4 get the support they need.
problem.impactText: Without support, children miss critical development. We believe every child deserves quality care anywhere.

solution.title: Introducing
solution.intro: AI-powered support for children with special needs — at home. Organizations and specialists assign content and track progress on one platform.
solution.platformIntro: One ecosystem for families and specialists.
solution.allInOneDesc: AI plus personalized support, on your schedule.
solution.personalizedLearningDesc: AI adapts to your child's pace

pricing.title: Plans for Organizations
pricing.subtitle: Pay monthly in KGS. Full access after payment.
pricing.starterF3: Parents connected via app — tasks, progress, direct messaging
pricing.starterF4: Create tasks and send notifications to parents
pricing.starterF5: Completion tracking, notes and history per child
pricing.starterF8: Basic activity reports and email support
pricing.growthF3: Everything in Starter — full feature set
pricing.growthF4: Custom content programs and development roadmaps
pricing.growthF6: Advanced group reports — CSV / PDF export
pricing.entF1: Everything in Starter & Growth — complete feature set
pricing.entF2: Finance module: payment tracking, statuses and history per child
pricing.entF5: Integrations and full customization for your workflows
pricing.entF6: Advanced roles, access control and team management
pricing.entF7: Onboarding, team training and launch support
pricing.entF8: Dedicated account manager and priority WhatsApp / Telegram support
pricing.enterpriseSubtitle: For center networks and large organizations
pricing.afterRegister: After registration, choose a plan and pay in the dashboard.

platform.title: For Organizations & Specialists
platform.intro: Groups, content, progress, and parent engagement — in one place.
platform.forOrganizationsDesc: Create your org, invite specialists, manage groups and families in one place.
platform.forSpecialistsDesc: Join as a specialist, get assigned to families, assign content, track progress.
platform.workWithParentsDesc: Assign exercises, follow progress, stay connected with parents.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: Your privacy and your child's safety are our top priorities. Learn how we protect your data.
privacyPage.encryptionDesc: Your data is protected in transit and at rest
privacyPage.controlsDesc: You control what data is shared
privacyPage.personalInfo1: Child's name, age, and developmental information (with parent consent)
privacyPage.personalInfo3: Progress tracking data and exercise results
privacyPage.usageInfo1: App usage patterns and feature interactions
privacyPage.use1Text: Create customized exercises and activities for your child
privacyPage.use2Text: Monitor development and provide insights to parents
privacyPage.use3Text: Enhance NurooAi responses and platform features
privacyPage.use4Text: Provide customer support and technical assistance
privacyPage.use5Text: Ensure platform security and prevent misuse
privacyPage.security1: End-to-end encryption for all data transmission
privacyPage.security2: Secure cloud storage with industry-standard protection
privacyPage.security3: Regular security audits and penetration testing
privacyPage.retentionText: We retain your data only as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations. You can request data deletion at any time.
privacyPage.right1Text: Request a copy of your personal data
privacyPage.right4Text: Export your data in a portable format
privacyPage.childrenIntro: Nuroo is designed for children with special needs, and we take extra care to protect their privacy. We never collect personal information from children without explicit parental consent.
privacyPage.children1: All child data collection requires parental consent
privacyPage.children2: Parents can review and delete their child's data at any time
privacyPage.children3: We never share children's personal information with third parties
privacyPage.children4: Child data is used only for educational and therapeutic purposes
privacyPage.thirdParty1: We may use third-party services for analytics, cloud storage, and communication. All third-party providers are carefully vetted and required to meet our security standards.
privacyPage.thirdParty2: We never sell your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.
privacyPage.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes via email or through the app. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance.
privacyPage.contactIntro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:

helpPage.title: Help Center
helpPage.subtitle: Find answers to common questions and get the support you need for your Nuroo journey.
helpPage.faq1Answer: Nuroo is an AI-powered platform designed to support children with special needs through personalized exercises, NurooAi chat support, and real-time progress tracking. Our goal is to make therapy accessible and affordable for every family.
helpPage.faq2Answer: NurooAi is our AI-powered chat assistant that provides 24/7 support specifically designed for special needs care. It offers instant responses, personalized guidance, and is always available to help parents and caregivers.
helpPage.faq3Answer: Nuroo is available now on the App Store and Google Play. Download the app and start your journey with personalized activities and AI support for your child's development.
helpPage.faq4Answer: Yes, absolutely. We use enterprise-grade security with HIPAA-compliant encryption and privacy controls. Your child's data is protected with end-to-end encryption and we never share personal information without consent.
helpPage.faq5Question: What types of special needs does Nuroo support?
helpPage.faq5Answer: Nuroo is designed to support children with various special needs including autism, ADHD, learning disabilities, developmental delays, and other conditions. Our AI adapts to each child's unique needs and learning style.
helpPage.faq6Answer: We're committed to making Nuroo affordable and accessible. Pricing details will be announced closer to our launch. We're working to ensure that quality support doesn't come with a high price tag.
helpPage.faq7Question: Can I use Nuroo alongside traditional therapy?
helpPage.faq7Answer: Yes! Nuroo is designed to complement traditional therapy, not replace it. Our platform can be used alongside existing therapy sessions to provide additional support and practice opportunities at home.
helpPage.stillNeedHelpDesc: Can't find what you're looking for? We're here to help.
